steps.title: Identify the antecedent and required number
steps.content: The blank must refer to “the substance” from the previous sentence — a singular noun.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: ”It” is the standard singular pronoun. “They” and “those” are plural, violating the agreement rule; “that,” while singular, is a demonstrative form, not the standard choice. That matches choice B — B is correct.
